title: Marjorie Taylor Greene's replacement sparks fierce debate ...
snippet: ... have an OEM replacement for MTG. 100% drop in, machined to exact specifications. Excellent work on the sourcing of the replacement part. Kakistocracy_0.
suggested_reply: Hello — this looks like a custom machining problem rather than an off-the-shelf part. If you have a sketch, photo, CAD file, material preference, rough quantity, and any tolerance notes for the replacement part, I can help point you toward a suitable UK machining partner. If it's just an idea so far, that's fine too — a rough outline is enough to start.
